texto: I did not know I was on a search for passionate aliveness. I only knew I was lonely and lost and that something was drawing me deeper beneath the surface of my life in search of meaning. There is a hunger in people to go to those deep depths
autor: to know that our lives are sacred
explicacao: Citação de to know that our lives are sacred sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “I did not know I was on a search for passionate aliveness. I only knew I was lonely and lost and …” articula reflexao, inspiracional, search em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
